title: eryngium koehneanum
intro: Eryngium koehneanum, also known as Koehne's Eryngium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eryngium koehneanum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Eryngium koehneanum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
